mapper.select: SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum /*계약번호 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) || '/' || SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS agentNm /*대리점 */ , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS cstmrName /*고객명 */ , SUB.USER_SSN AS ssn /*주민번호 */ , REQ.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType /*고객구분코드 */ , REQ.FST_RATE_NM AS fstRateNm /*최초요금제 */ , REQ.LST_RATE_NM AS lstRateNm /*현재요금제 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 23, 3)) AS instMnthCnt /*할부개월수 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN ( SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 1, 2)) ELSE ( SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 1, 2)) END AS sprtTpNm /*할인유형 */ , REQ.OPER_TYPE_NM AS operTypeNm /*개통유형 */ , NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.FST_MODEL_INFO, 21 , 30)), REQ.REQ_USIM_NAME) AS fstModelNm /*최초개통단말 */ , NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 13, 10)), 0) AS modelInstallment /*할부원금 */ , REQ.SHOP_NM AS shopNm /*판매점 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB.SUB_STATUS)AS subStatusNm /*상태 */ , CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN CASE WHEN 0 = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '당일개통취소' WHEN 15 > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '14일이내해지' WHEN 90 > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '90일이내해지' ELSE '일반해지' END ELSE '' END AS canRsn /*해지사유 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 26, 3)) AS enggMnthCnt /*약정개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 3, 3)) AS simEnggMnthCnt /*심플약정기간 */ , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo /*휴대폰번호 */ , DECODE((SELECT AGR_YN FROM MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND END_DTTM = '99991231235959' ), 'Y', '동의', '미동의') AS reqClausePriAdFlagNm /*정보광고수신위탁동의 */ , NVL2(INSR.INSR_NM2, 'Y', 'N') AS insrYn2 /*선택형단체보험가입여부 */ , INSR.INSR_NM2 AS insrNm2 /*선택형단체보험명 */ , FRM.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG AS clausePriAdFlag /*광고수신동의여부 */ , FRM.INSR_FORM_FLAG AS insrFormFlag /*상해보험서식지등록여부 */ , FRM.INSR_CFMT_FLAG AS insrCfmtFlag /*상해보험적격여부 */ , CASE WHEN FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD IN ('SNOK', 'SOK') THEN 'FNOK' ELSE FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD END AS fstRsltCd /*1차검증결과 */ , FRM.FST_REMARK AS fstRemark /*1차검증비고 */ , CASE WHEN FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD IN ('SNOK', 'SOK') THEN FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD ELSE NULL END AS sndRsltCd /*2차검증결과 */ , FRM.SND_REMARK AS sndRemark /*2차검증비고 */ , FRM.FST_ACT_CD as fstActCd /*1차조치결과 */ , FRM.FST_ACT_REMARK as fstActRemark /*1차조치비고 */ , FRM.SND_ACT_CD as sndActCd /*2차조치결과 */ , FRM.SND_ACT_REMARK as sndActRemark /*2차조치비고 */ , DECODE(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS dvcChgYn /*기변여부 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 19, 30)) AS dvcModelNm /*기변모델명 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 69, 10)) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS dvcAgntNm /*기변대리점 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0049', SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 79, 4)) AS dvcOperTypeNm /*기변유형명(개통유형) */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 103, 3)) AS dvcInstMnthCnt /*기변단말할부개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 106, 3)) AS dvcEnggMnthCnt /*기변약정개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 93, 10)) AS dvcInstOrginAmnt /*기변단말할부원금*/ , FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD AS vrfyStatCd , FRM.FST_USR_ID AS fstUsrId , FRM.SND_USR_ID AS sndUsrId , NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0081' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = #{vrfyUsrId}),'N') AS adminYn , CASE WHEN FRM.FST_VRFY_DTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > TRUNC(FRM.FST_VRFY_DTTM+1)+9/24 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS fstModifyYn , CASE WHEN FRM.SND_VRFY_DTTM IS NOT NULL AND SYSDATE > TRUNC(FRM.SND_VRFY_DTTM+1)+9/24 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS sndModifyYn FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ , MSP_FORM_VRFY_INFO FRM , ( SELECT TRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(DECODE(ETC2, 'Y', INSR_NM), ' ')) AS INSR_NM2 , CONTRACT_NUM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.INSR_CD , B.CD_DSC AS INSR_NM , B.ETC2 , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.INSR_CD) AS NUM , COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS CNT , NVL(( SELECT MAX(CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG) FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_CD = A.INSR_CD AND TSK_TP = 'INS' AND SEQ_NUM = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ_NUM) FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_CD = A.INSR_CD AND TSK_TP = 'INS')), D.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG) AS CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C , MSP_REQUEST D /* 개통시 신청 */ WHERE A.STAT_CD = 'A' AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0246' AND A.INSR_CD = B.CD_VAL AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.INSR_CD = D.INSR_CD(+) ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.INSR_CD, B.ETC2) WHERE LEVEL = CNT START WITH NUM = 1 CONNECT BY PRIOR CONTRACT_NUM = CONTRACT_NUM AND PRIOR NUM = NUM - 1 ) INSR WHERE SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = FRM.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = INSR.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum /*계약번호 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) || '/' || SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS agentNm /*대리점 */ , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS cstmrName /*고객명 */ , SUB.USER_SSN AS ssn /*주민번호 */ , REQ.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType /*고객구분코드 */ , REQ.FST_RATE_NM AS fstRateNm /*최초요금제 */ , REQ.LST_RATE_NM AS lstRateNm /*현재요금제 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 23, 3)) AS instMnthCnt /*할부개월수 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN ( SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 1, 2)) ELSE ( SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 1, 2)) END AS sprtTpNm /*할인유형 */ , REQ.OPER_TYPE_NM AS operTypeNm /*개통유형 */ , NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.FST_MODEL_INFO, 21 , 30)), REQ.REQ_USIM_NAME) AS fstModelNm /*최초개통단말 */ , NVL(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 13, 10)), 0) AS modelInstallment /*할부원금 */ , REQ.SHOP_NM AS shopNm /*판매점 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB.SUB_STATUS)AS subStatusNm /*상태 */ , CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN CASE WHEN 0 = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '당일개통취소' WHEN 15 > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '14일이내해지' WHEN 90 > TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN '90일이내해지' ELSE '일반해지' END ELSE '' END AS canRsn /*해지사유 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 26, 3)) AS enggMnthCnt /*약정개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 3, 3)) AS simEnggMnthCnt /*심플약정기간 */ , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo /*휴대폰번호 */ , DECODE((SELECT AGR_YN FROM MSP_MRKT_AGR_MGMT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND END_DTTM = '99991231235959' ), 'Y', '동의', '미동의') AS reqClausePriAdFlagNm /*정보광고수신위탁동의 */ , NVL2(INSR.INSR_NM2, 'Y', 'N') AS insrYn2 /*선택형단체보험가입여부 */ , INSR.INSR_NM2 AS insrNm2 /*선택형단체보험명 */ , FRM.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG AS clausePriAdFlag /*광고수신동의여부 */ , FRM.INSR_FORM_FLAG AS insrFormFlag /*상해보험서식지등록여부 */ , FRM.INSR_CFMT_FLAG AS insrCfmtFlag /*상해보험적격여부 */ , CASE WHEN FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD IN ('SNOK', 'SOK') THEN 'FNOK' ELSE FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD END AS fstRsltCd /*1차검증결과 */ , FRM.FST_REMARK AS fstRemark /*1차검증비고 */ , CASE WHEN FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD IN ('SNOK', 'SOK') THEN FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD ELSE NULL END AS sndRsltCd /*2차검증결과 */ , FRM.SND_REMARK AS sndRemark /*2차검증비고 */ , FRM.FST_ACT_CD as fstActCd /*1차조치결과 */ , FRM.FST_ACT_REMARK as fstActRemark /*1차조치비고 */ , FRM.SND_ACT_CD as sndActCd /*2차조치결과 */ , FRM.SND_ACT_REMARK as sndActRemark /*2차조치비고 */ , DECODE(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS dvcChgYn /*기변여부 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 19, 30)) AS dvcModelNm /*기변모델명 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 69, 10)) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS dvcAgntNm /*기변대리점 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0049', SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 79, 4)) AS dvcOperTypeNm /*기변유형명(개통유형) */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 103, 3)) AS dvcInstMnthCnt /*기변단말할부개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 106, 3)) AS dvcEnggMnthCnt /*기변약정개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 93, 10)) AS dvcInstOrginAmnt /*기변단말할부원금*/ , FRM.VRFY_STAT_CD AS vrfyStatCd FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ , MSP_FORM_VRFY_INFO FRM , ( SELECT TRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(DECODE(ETC2, 'Y', INSR_NM), ' ')) AS INSR_NM2 , CONTRACT_NUM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.INSR_CD , B.CD_DSC AS INSR_NM , B.ETC2 , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.INSR_CD) AS NUM , COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS CNT , NVL(( SELECT MAX(CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG) FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_CD = A.INSR_CD AND TSK_TP = 'INS' AND SEQ_NUM = ( SELECT MAX(SEQ_NUM) FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND INSR_CD = A.INSR_CD AND TSK_TP = 'INS')), D.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG) AS CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C , MSP_REQUEST D /* 개통시 신청 */ WHERE A.STAT_CD = 'A' AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0246' AND A.INSR_CD = B.CD_VAL AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.INSR_CD = D.INSR_CD(+) ORDER BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.INSR_CD, B.ETC2) WHERE LEVEL = CNT START WITH NUM = 1 CONNECT BY PRIOR CONTRACT_NUM = CONTRACT_NUM AND PRIOR NUM = NUM - 1 ) INSR WHERE SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = FRM.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = INSR.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/* FormVrfyMgmtMapper."getFormVrfyUsrList" */
SELECT b.USR_ID , b.USR_ID AS USR_ID_MSK , c.ORGN_NM , b.USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST b , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST c WHERE 1 = 1 AND b.ORGN_ID = c.ORGN_ID(+) AND b.USG_YN <> 'N' AND b.USR_ID IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0080' AND USG_YN = 'Y')
AND c.ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{orgnNm} || '%'
AND b.USR_ID LIKE '%' || #{usrId} || '%'
AND b.USR_NM LIKE '%' || #{usrNm} || '%'
ORDER BY c.ORGN_NM, b.USR_ID
